title: rubus irenaeus
intro: Rubus irenaeus is a lesser-known species of the Rubus genus, commonly referred to as the Himalayan Raspberry, which is a type of wild raspberry native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Rubus irenaeus plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus irenaeus, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
